basics.name: Yicheng Ma
basics.label: Computer Science Undergraduate | Computer Vision & Full-Stack Developer
basics.summary: Undergraduate in Computer Science and Technology at Zhejiang University of Science and Technology, focused on computer vision, intelligent detection systems, and full-stack web development. Experienced in edge AI deployment, video analytics, real-time visualization, and end-to-end application development for smart agriculture, intelligent transportation, and digital inspection workflows.

work.summary: Built a smart agriculture monitoring platform for blueberry ripeness detection, tomato growth analysis, and multimodal agricultural scene recognition.
highlights: Tech stack: FastAPI, Vue 3, Tailwind CSS, Axios, Chart.js, SQLite/SQLAlchemy, PyTorch, YOLOv8, OpenCV, PyAV, Transformers.
Implemented UGV/UAV dual-stream video access, real-time result visualization, history traceability, playback, and statistical dashboards.

work.position: Hangzhou Cargo Station Checklist Management System
work.summary: Developed a digital checklist platform for employee-side reporting and administrator-side management.
highlights: Tech stack: Node.js, Express, MongoDB, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, JWT, Multer.
Implemented authentication, dynamic checklist rendering, record submission, image upload, template management, statistics, AI-assisted reporting, and issue closed-loop tracking.

work.position: Agricultural Multimodal Large Language Model Fine-Tuning
work.summary: Optimized multimodal large language models for agricultural scenarios.
highlights: Worked on dataset construction, knowledge base building, hyperparameter tuning, and deployment on edge processors.

work.summary: Participated in the frontend development of an integrated intelligent transportation and urban governance platform.
highlights: Tech stack: Vue 3, JavaScript, CSS, Ant Design Vue, Vue Router, MQTT.
Built login, profile center, warning notifications, dashboards, and MQTT-based real-time alert pushing.

work.position: Space-Air-Ground Integrated Ripeness Detection System (Web Visualization Platform)
work.summary: Built a public web platform for blueberry ripeness visualization and real-time analytics.
highlights: Tech stack: Flask, Jinja2, PyAV, OpenCV, PyAudio, MySQL.
Implemented real-time rendering of videos and structured analytics including category, confidence, and count, with database persistence and playback.

work.position: Zhihang Road Control - Intelligent Vehicle Detection System
work.summary: Built a desktop-side interaction system for multi-type vehicle recognition and monitoring in large transportation hubs.
highlights: Tech stack: PyQt5, PyAV, OpenCV, NumPy, pickle.
Implemented login/registration, user management, video playback, live camera capture, recording, storage, and historical playback.

work.position: UAV & Robot Integrated Crop Ripeness Detection System
work.summary: Developed an edge-computing detection system integrating UAV/robot video capture, accelerated inference, remote streaming, and visualization.
highlights: Tech stack: RTMP, PyQt, MySQL, TensorRT, PyTorch.
Implemented the local UI, integrated TensorRT-accelerated object detection, and supported real-time database logging plus video storage and playback.

education.institution: Zhejiang University of Science and Technology
education.area: B.Eng. in Computer Science and Technology
